mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TkexamDAO.quizExamneeSelect 설 명 : 퀴즈응시자조회 */ SELECT NVL((SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT WHERE ORG_ID = USR.ORG_ID AND DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID),'-') AS DEPTNM , NVL(USR.STDNT_NO,'-') AS STDNT_NO , USR.USERNM , USR.USER_ID , NVL(TKEXAM_RSLT.TOT_SCR,0) AS TOT_SCR , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER USR LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM ON USR.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID AND TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT TKEXAM_RSLT ON TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID = TKEXAM_RSLT.TKEXAM_ID AND TKEXAM.USER_ID = TKEXAM_RSLT.USER_ID WHERE USR.USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : TkexamDAO.userTkexamStatusSelect 설 명 : 사용자시험응시현황조회 */ SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TKEXAM_CD = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS NO_TKEXAM_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TKEXAM_CD = 'T' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TEMP_SAVE_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TKEXAM_CD = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS COMPLETE_CNT , NVL(ROUND(AVG(QUIZ_SCR)), 0) AS AVG_SCORE , NVL(MAX(QUIZ_SCR), 0) AS MAX_SCORE , NVL(MIN(QUIZ_SCR), 0) AS MIN_SCORE , NVL(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN LINE_NO <= CNT THEN QUIZ_SCR ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(CNT,0)),0) AS TOP_AVG_SCORE FROM ( SELECT QUIZ_SCR , TKEXAM_CD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY QUIZ_SCR DESC) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(1) OVER () / 10 AS CNT FROM ( SELECT TKEXAM.QUIZ_SCR , CASE WHEN TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM IS NULL THEN 'T' WHEN TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM IS NOT NULL THEN 'C' END AS TKEXAM_CD , CASE WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD = 'QUIZ' THEN 'Y' WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD = 'QUIZ_TEAM' THEN CASE WHEN SBJCT_USER.USER_ID IN ( SELECT TEAM_MBR.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TEAM_MBR JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR EXAM_TRGTR ON TEAM_MBR.TEAM_ID = EXAM_TRGTR.TEAM_ID WHERE EXAM_TRGTR.EXAM_DTL_ID IN ( SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N') ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ_EXAM_MID', 'QUIZ_EXAM_LST') THEN CASE WHEN SBJCT_USER.USER_ID NOT IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_MID', 'QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_LST') THEN CASE WHEN SBJCT_USER.USER_ID IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END AS IS_TARGET FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID, SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE AUDITYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ) SBJCT_USER ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT_USER.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TKEXAM.USER_ID , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM , NVL(SUM(ANSW.SCR), 0) AS QUIZ_SCR FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL ON TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID = EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EXAMPPR ON TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID = EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID AND TKEXAM.USER_ID = EXAMPPR.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT ANSW ON EXAMPPR.EXAMPPR_ID = ANSW.EXAMPPR_ID AND EXAMPPR.USER_ID = ANSW.USER_ID WHERE TKEXAM.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY TKEXAM.USER_ID, TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM, TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM ) TKEXAM ON SBJCT_USER.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID WHERE EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND EXAM_BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_BSC.USEYN = 'Y' ) WHERE IS_TARGET = 'Y' ) GROUP BY CNT
